creator: yuri@irfu.se
text:
Onboard Broadcom nic BCM5754 (0x167a)

none1@pci4:0:0: class=0x020000 card=0x01de1028 chip=0x167a14e4 rev=0x02 hdr=0x00
    vendor   = 'Broadcom Corporation'
    class    = network
    subclass = ethernet

is detected as BCM5787 during boot and panics the system with Fatal trap 19.
The mashine is Dell Precision 390.

The problem was reported by a number of people on freebsb-stable in September/October 2006.
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2006-October/029420.html
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2006-October/029208.html

How-To-Repeat: Boot the latest RELENG_6 on a Dell Precision 390
